Precautions for Use: Avoid overloading: Do not load excessive weight or sharp objects to prevent damage to the tote bag. Waterproof and moisture-proof: The kraft paper is easily softened by water, please try to avoid using the bag in rainy days or exposing the bag to water directly. Correct storage: When not in use, please store the bag in a dry place, avoid humid environment to prevent mould. Careful folding: Repeated folding in the same position May result in cracks at the creases, so it is recommended to store the bags according to the original creases. Environmentally friendly use: Encourage multiple reuse of these bags to reduce the use of disposable plastic bags and protect the environment. Child safety: Avoid toddlers from tearing or gnawing the handles and prevent swallowing small parts.
